rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Windows Explorer Spawning Command Shell with Start and Exit Commands

rules.rule_text:
title: Windows Explorer Spawning Command Shell with Start and Exit Commands
id: ebb4eaad-9909-4785-a038-97bdee8aa5ae
status: experimental
description: "This detection analytic looks for instances of explorer.exe spawning\
  \ cmd.exe along \nwith corresponding start and exit commands that we commonly observe\
  \ in conjunction \nwith a wide variety of malicious activity. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ 2024 Threat \nDetection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-command-shell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1059.003
- attack.t1053
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \explorer.exe
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - start
    - exit
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
